sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: Used by Cai Mao to guard the north road in case Liu Bei slipped through his plot. Later, after Cai Mao was executed by Cao Cao, Cai Zhong was sent with Cai He as pretend defectors to spy on Wu but Zhou Yu and his officers saw through the ploy. Cai Zhong was fed information that Huang Gai, Kan Zhe and Gan Ning which to defect and when the attack started, Cai Zhong was forced to be a guide by Gan Ning, taking the Wu general into innermost recesses of Cao Cao’s camp and was then slain.

full_text:
Cai Zhong 蔡中
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Zhong (蔡中). Cai Mao’s cousin. Surrendered to Wu before Chibi, but was killed by Gan Ning. Cai Zhong is a fictional character. Cai Zhong was affiliated with Liu Biao, the Wei Kingdom, and the Wu Kingdom. Cai Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
Used by Cai Mao to guard the north road in case Liu Bei slipped through his plot. Later, after Cai Mao was executed by Cao Cao, Cai Zhong was sent with Cai He as pretend defectors to spy on Wu but Zhou Yu and his officers saw through the ploy. Cai Zhong was fed information that Huang Gai, Kan Zhe and Gan Ning which to defect and when the attack started, Cai Zhong was forced to be a guide by Gan Ning, taking the Wu general into innermost recesses of Cao Cao’s camp and was then slain.
